title: MAGE Agent Evaluation Record
description: Schema for recording a single evaluation run against a held-out task

task_id.description: ID of the held-out task (matches held-out-tasks.jsonl)

agent_id.description: Identifier for the agent model or system under test

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the evaluation run

rdx_source.description: The agent's generated MAGE source code

generation_time_ms.description: Wall-clock time for generation in milliseconds

compiles.description: Whether the generated code compiles without errors

token_efficiency.description: Ratio: generated tokens / reference tokens (lower is better)

effects_correct.description: Whether effect annotations match the reference

first_pass.description: True if correct on the first generation attempt

iterations.description: Number of generation attempts before success (or max)
